Home › Orange County › Orlando › EL IMPORTADO
D 63

EL IMPORTADO

This grade is calculated by us from Florida DBPR public inspection records — Florida does not issue official grades. How we calculate it →

Data last updated: February 25, 2026

Loved (4.5★) but failing (D, 63/100) · safer than 5% of Orange County

The crowd and the inspector disagree about EL IMPORTADO, and it isn't close: 3,596 reviewers settle on 4.5 stars, while its latest health inspection lands at a D, 63/100.

By health score it sits safer than 5% of Orange County restaurants we grade — among the riskier kitchens in the county. The grade reflects 2 high-priority, 3 intermediate, and 12 basic violations at its last inspection on February 25, 2026. Worse, the trend is downward. Safer, higher-graded picks nearby are listed below.

Get directions Call (407) 930-5563

Safer options nearby

Higher-graded restaurants close to EL IMPORTADO, by Florida DBPR grade:

  • A
    DOMINO'S PIZZA #3835

    3.6★ nearby

  • A
    TWISTEE TREAT AT WHISPER LAKES

    4.7★ 0.1 mi away

  • A
    MCDONALD'S RESTAURANTS

    3.7★ 0.2 mi away

Inspection history

The following records are from Florida DBPR public inspection records, most recent first.

  1. February 25, 2026 · Routine - Food

    Inspection Completed - No Further Action

    2 high-priority · 3 intermediate · 12 basic

    • 05 — Food & equipment thermometers provided and accurate
    • 08 — Cross-contamination: raw foods separated; food protected during prep/storage (×3)
    • 11 — Employee health knowledge; no ill/symptomatic employee present
    • 14 — Food-contact & nonfood-contact surfaces properly designed/maintained
    • 29 — Plumbing installed & maintained; mop sink; backflow prevention
    • 31 — Handwash sinks accessible; handwashing supplies & sign provided (×3)
    • 32 — Bathrooms
    • 33 — Garbage and refuse; premises maintained (×3)
    • 35 — Insects/rodents/pests; outer openings protected against pests (×2)
    • 36 — Floors, walls, ceilings clean & maintained; proper ventilation

  2. October 3, 2025 · Routine - Food

    Inspection Completed - No Further Action

    0 high-priority · 3 intermediate · 10 basic

    • 12 — Handwashing; employee eating/drinking/smoking practices
    • 14 — Food-contact & nonfood-contact surfaces properly designed/maintained
    • 29 — Plumbing installed & maintained; mop sink; backflow prevention
    • 31 — Handwash sinks accessible; handwashing supplies & sign provided (×3)
    • 33 — Garbage and refuse; premises maintained
    • 35 — Insects/rodents/pests; outer openings protected against pests (×2)
    • 36 — Floors, walls, ceilings clean & maintained; proper ventilation
    • 40 — Employee personal belongings
    • 42 — Cleaning and maintenance equipment
    • 53 — Food manager certification; employee food-safety training
